events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a stop-work condition. Finding a lock without a matching tag (or vice versa) at an energy-isolating device violates OSHA 1910.147(c)(5) — every isolating device must carry both the authorized employee's lock and identifying tag. Work must halt, the missing device must be applied, and zero-energy state re-verified before service continues. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: critical`.
